title: PREPARE DATE_ADD/DATE_SUB incorrectly returns DATETIME
poc: PREPARE stmt1 FROM "SELECT DATE_ADD(?, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS a";
PREPARE stmt2 FROM "SELECT DATE_ADD('2021-05-22', INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS a";
PREPARE stmt1 FROM "SELECT DATE_ADD(?, INTERVAL 1 DAY)";
key_bug_features: Prepared statements return DateTime instead of Date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE NOT NULL);
PREPARE stmt1 FROM 'SELECT DATE_ADD(event_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS next_day FROM test_dates WHERE id = ?';
